content: Language education’s reflexion vocabulary learning framework can be repurposed to train multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, where learners’ iterative practice of defining reflexion across different linguistic contexts maps directly to training LLMs to critique their own outputs from inconsistent solving perspectives. This framing redefines LLM self-reflection not as a specialized AI capability, but as a advanced iteration of the same reflective vocabulary learning that human learners practice.
